recommendations.title: We Will Go
recommendations.overview: An unexpected road trip brings a dysfunctional family together for one last journey with their elder, sparking moments of connection, joy, and reconciliation.

recommendations.title: The Cocoanuts
recommendations.overview: During the Florida land boom, the Marx Brothers run a hotel, auction off some land and thwart a jewel robbery.

recommendations.title: Scars
recommendations.overview: The story of a dysfunctional couple, whose problems will inevitably deteriorate their marriage and their son's life.

recommendations.title: The Grinch
recommendations.overview: The Grinch hatches a scheme to ruin Christmas when the residents of Whoville plan their annual holiday celebration.

recommendations.title: Lord, Give Me Patience
recommendations.overview: An ultraconservative family father must spend a weekend with his dysfunctional children for the burial of his wife.

recommendations.title: Carrossel: O Filme
recommendations.overview: A group of friends finds their fun at vacation camp ruined when a big corporate developer threatens to build a pollution-spewing factory on the land.

recommendations.title: Vai Que Dá Certo
recommendations.overview: 5 friends have a plan to rob a transporter that can change their lives.

recommendations.title: The Bears' Famous Invasion of Sicily
recommendations.overview: Our story starts with Tonio, the son the bears King, being kidnapped by some hunters in the Sicilian mountains. Because of the harshness of a winter that threatens its clan with famine, the Bear King decides to invade the land of men (in the hope of

recommendations.title: Feyzo, The Polite One
recommendations.overview: To bid for his beloved's hand in marriage, poor villager Feyzo must come up with an enormous dowry to appease her father.

recommendations.title: The People We Hate at the Wedding
recommendations.overview: A dysfunctional family that can't seem to get along and get it together reluctantly reunites for a family wedding. As their many skeletons are wrenched from the closet, it turns out to be just what this singular family needs to reconnect.
